title: columella oligocarpa
intro: Columella oligocarpa, also known as the 'small-fruited columella' or 'small-fruited corydalis', is a plant species that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as pain, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Columella oligocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
